message:
feat(core): add CompiledPattern caching and expand legacy migration helpers

pattern_overlap.rs:
- Add CompiledPattern::cached() constructor backed by a global LRU cache
  so repeated overlap checks against the same glob pattern avoid
  recompilation. Used by the CLI reservation filter refactor to avoid
  O(n*m) glob compilation during conflict detection.
- Expand pattern overlap logic with additional edge-case handling

legacy.rs:
- Expand legacy Python database migration helpers with improved error
  context and additional migration path support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
